mapper.select: SELECT rec.id, rec.competition_id AS competitionId, rec.student_id AS studentId, rec.prize_name AS prize FROM external_competition_record rec LEFT JOIN external_competition_group gro ON gro.id = rec.group_id LEFT JOIN external_competition com ON com.id = rec.competition_id WHERE rec.deleted = 0 AND rec.class_id = #{classId} AND com.deleted = 0 AND rec.update_time >= #{semesterStart} AND #{semesterEnd} >= rec.update_time
